positive: A whimsical and elegant illustration of a mystical forest creature, like a stylized fox or a forest spirit, sitting among bioluminescent flora. The scene is composed with strong central symmetry, featuring deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and touches of glowing gold light. The style should be a sophisticated vector art fusion, combining delicate line work with bold, flat areas of color, optimized for screen printing on fabric. The creature should have a graceful, iconic silhouette against a dramatic background. Include detailed jungle leaves, glowing mushrooms, and flowing, organic patterns. Clean vector aesthetics, maximum contrast, perfect composition, printable on fabric.
